results.title: The US almost blacklisted DeepSeek for contributing to China’s military and intelligence — but the White House held back to avoid escalating tensions
results.description: Chinese firms were not added to the Entity List ahead of Trump's meeting with Chinese premier Xi Jinping.

results.title: OG&E proposes new rules for large electricity users like data centers
results.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (KFOR) — Data centers have been a hot debate in the state. Many residents are fighting to keep them away because of the amount of electricity needed to run them. OG&E just released a list of rules for these kinds of facilities and wants the Oklahoma Corporation Commission to approve them. OG&E said [...]
